style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [Bridge] 冲破！一切束缚的枷锁 / 翻越！看见从未有过的世界

atmosphere.overall_mood: 穿越高潮——主观镜头冲破翻滚云层，从灰暗天空冲入金色阳光，俯瞰翠绿茶山梯田全景展开
atmosphere.lighting: 从翠绿穿越光→冲破云层后的金色阳光
atmosphere.weather: 穿越云层，从阴云→金色日出

video_prompt: First-person POV crashing through swirling clouds and emerging above them to see a magnificent panorama of lush green tea mountains with golden sunrise, transformation from Hong Kong retro to Chinese fantasy landscape, epic aerial reveal, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 桥段——管弦乐全奏配合电子元素，气势磅礴的上升旋律
bgm.instruments: 管弦乐全奏、电子鼓、合成器上行扫音
bgm.dynamics: 持续高能上升→顶点爆发

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主观镜头——从SEG04的绿光中醒来，发现自己正在高速穿越翻滚的灰白云层

transition.description: 从SEG04绿光直接切入云层穿越

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 云层翻涌——穿越通道的中段
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: First-person POV shot flying at high speed through thick swirling gray-white clouds, the clouds rushing past on all sides, occasional flashes of green light in the clouds, turbulent atmospheric passage, speed lines and motion blur, cinematic POV flying sequence, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主观镜头继续穿越——云层开始变薄，边缘渗透出金色光线，光芒越来越强
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 云层变薄——光在另一边等待
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 风声渐弱、金色光芒嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: First-person POV flying upward through thinning clouds, golden light beginning to break through the cloud edges, rays of warm sunlight penetrating the mist, the clouds brightening from gray to white to gold, anticipation of breakthrough, cinematic ascending flight, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 爆破云顶！——主观镜头猛然冲破最后一层云，耀眼的金色阳光瞬间灌入
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 冲破的瞬间——从灰暗到金色的视觉震撼
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 巨大的气浪爆破声 + 管弦乐爆发
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dramatic first-person POV moment of breaking through the top of a cloud layer into blinding golden sunlight, the cloud surface exploding outward like water, brilliant gold and white light flooding the frame, the shock of emerging from darkness into radiant light, epic cinematic breakthrough moment, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 云顶之上——翻滚的白色云海延伸到天际，金色阳光洒满一切，纯粹的自由感
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 云海之上的自由——完成从旧世界到新世界的过渡
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Breathtaking panoramic view above a sea of white clouds stretching to the horizon, brilliant golden sunlight casting long rays across the cloud tops, pure freedom and vastness, the sky shifting from gray to vibrant blue and gold, epic aerial cloudscape, cinematic wide shot, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 镜头开始向下倾斜——云海之间露出大片翠绿色，茶山梯田的轮廓在云隙中若隐若现
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 云海间的第一眼——茶山世界隐约浮现
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Aerial camera tilting downward through gaps in the cloud sea, revealing glimpses of lush green terraced tea mountains far below, the emerald terraces peeking through cotton-white clouds, mist weaving between mountain ridges, first glimpse of the fantasy tea mountain world, epic aerial discovery, vibrant green, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 俯冲穿云——镜头从云海中穿下，翠绿茶山梯田完整展开在眼前，层层叠叠延伸向远方
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山全景展开——新世界的壮丽揭幕
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dramatic aerial dive through clouds revealing a magnificent panorama of lush green terraced tea mountains, endless emerald tiers cascading down mountain slopes, golden sunlight illuminating the terraces, ethereal mist floating between layers, traditional Chinese fantasy landscape fully unveiled, epic scale aerial reveal, vibrant saturated colors, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 航拍低空掠过茶山梯田——能看到翠绿的茶树整齐排列，晨露在叶尖闪光，远处有云雾缭绕的山峰
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山的细节之美——仙境般的梯田
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Low altitude aerial flyover of terraced tea mountains, close enough to see individual emerald green tea bushes in neat rows glistening with morning dew, mist curling between the terraces, distant mountain peaks shrouded in clouds, golden sunlight creating long shadows on the terraces, Chinese fantasy tea mountain paradise, vivid green and gold, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 航拍镜头上升远拉——揭示茶山梯田的全景规模，如巨龙般蜿蜒盘旋在群山之间
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山的宏大全景——如龙脊蜿蜒
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Epic wide aerial shot pulling up and back to reveal the full magnificent scale of terraced tea mountains stretching across multiple peaks, the terraces winding like a dragon's spine through the misty mountains, golden light breaking through clouds in god-rays, vast Chinese fantasy landscape at its most majestic, saturated greens and golds, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 茶山梯田间——一个白衣身影（创作者B）站在一处茶田边缘的岩石上，背对镜头，衣袂飘动，俯瞰群山

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 背对镜头站在岩石上，衣袂飘动

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 新世界中的新身份——白衣侠客的首次亮相
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Wide shot of a figure in flowing white traditional Chinese warrior robes standing on a rock at the edge of a tea terrace, back to camera, white garments billowing in the wind, overlooking a vast panorama of misty green tea mountains, golden sunrise behind distant peaks, first appearance of the transformed hero, Chinese fantasy epic pose, vibrant colors, 16:9 aspect ratio
